inputs.label: Account Balance (IRA Balance)
inputs.businessContext: Total balance in the retirement account as of December 31 of the previous year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total balance in the retirement account as of December 31 of the previous year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Önceki yılın 31 Aralık tarihi itibarıyla emeklilik hesabındaki toplam bakiye.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtsaldo des Altersvorsorgekontos zum 31. Dezember des Vorjahres
businessContext_i18n.fr: Solde total du compte de retraite au 31 décembre de l'année précédente.
businessContext_i18n.es: Saldo total en la cuenta de jubilación al 31 de diciembre del año anterior.

inputs.label: Age (Current Year Age)
inputs.businessContext: Age of the account owner as of the current year. Used to determine the life expectancy factor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the account owner as of the current year. Used to determine the life expectancy factor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesap sahibinin cari yıldaki yaşı. Yaşam beklentisi faktörünü belirlemek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter des Kontoinhabers im aktuellen Jahr. Wird zur Bestimmung des Lebenserwartungsfaktors verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge du propriétaire du compte au cours de l'année en cours. Utilisé pour déterminer le facteur d'espérance de vie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad del titular de la cuenta en el año actual. Se utiliza para determinar el factor de esperanza de vida.

inputs.label: Spouse Age (if applicable)
inputs.businessContext: Age of spouse if the account owner is married and spouse is the sole beneficiary. Used for joint life expectancy factor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of spouse if the account owner is married and spouse is the sole beneficiary. Used for joint life expectancy factor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesap sahibi evliyse ve eşi tek varis ise eşin yaşı. Ortak yaşam beklentisi faktörü için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter des Ehepartners, wenn der Kontoinhaber verheiratet ist und der Ehepartner der alleinige Begünstigte ist. Wird für den gemeinsamen Lebenserwartungsfaktor verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge du conjoint si le propriétaire du compte est marié et que le conjoint est l'unique bénéficiaire. Utilisé pour le facteur d'espérance de vie conjointe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad del cónyuge si el titular está casado y el cónyuge es el único beneficiario. Se utiliza para el factor de esperanza de vida conjunta.

inputs.label: Beneficiary Type
inputs.businessContext: 1 = Spouse sole beneficiary, 2 = Non-spouse beneficiary, 3 = No designated beneficiary. Determines which life expectancy table to use.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 = Spouse sole beneficiary, 2 = Non-spouse beneficiary, 3 = No designated beneficiary. Determines which life expectancy table to use.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 = Eş tek varis, 2 = Eş olmayan varis, 3 = Belirlenmiş varis yok. Hangi yaşam beklentisi tablosunun kullanılacağını belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 = Ehepartner alleiniger Begünstigter, 2 = Nicht-Ehepartner-Begünstigter, 3 = Kein benannter Begünstigter. Bestimmt, welche Lebenserwartungstabelle verwendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 = Conjoint unique bénéficiaire, 2 = Bénéficiaire non conjoint, 3 = Aucun bénéficiaire désigné. Détermine la table d'espérance de vie à utiliser.
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 = Cónyuge único beneficiario, 2 = Beneficiario no cónyuge, 3 = Sin beneficiario designado. Determina qué tabla de esperanza de vida usar.

inputs.label: Life Expectancy Factor (Override)
inputs.businessContext: Optional override for the life expectancy factor. If 0, the factor is calculated based on age and beneficiary type using IRS tables.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional override for the life expectancy factor. If 0, the factor is calculated based on age and beneficiary type using IRS tables.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaşam beklentisi faktörü için isteğe bağlı geçersiz kılma. 0 ise, faktör yaş ve varis türüne göre IRS tabloları kullanılarak hesaplanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optionale Überschreibung des Lebenserwartungsfaktors. Bei 0 wird der Faktor basierend auf Alter und Begünstigten-Typ anhand der IRS-Tabellen berechnet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Remplacement facultatif du facteur d'espérance de vie. Si 0, le facteur est calculé en fonction de l'âge et du type de bénéficiaire à l'aide des tables IRS.
businessContext_i18n.es: Anulación opcional del factor de esperanza de vida. Si es 0, el factor se calcula según la edad y el tipo de beneficiario usando las tablas del IRS.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
